name: Agent Cron
description: Agent-isolated cron wrapper. Provides agent_cron_* tools with per-agent ACL, quotas, and audit logging over OpenClaw's built-in cron.

storePath.description: Directory for SQLite database files. Defaults to <stateDir>/agent-cron

defaultTz.description: Default timezone for cron expressions without explicit tz

adminAgentIds.description: Agent IDs with cross-agent management privileges

maxJobsPerAgent.description: Maximum number of active jobs per agent

minIntervalSeconds.description: Minimum allowed interval between runs in seconds

maxTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum allowed timeout per run in seconds

openclawBin.description: Path to the openclaw binary (resolved via PATH by default)
